response_constraints: Add the new pause without dropping or altering any existing job-search facts.

stages.purpose: Read the existing summary before modifying it.

arguments.summary: Portfolio updated. Two interviews scheduled. Reference list confirmed. New application outreach paused until October.

stages.purpose: Append the durable outreach pause while retaining all prior job-search progress.

state_assertions: recursive summary includes the outreach pause until October
recursive summary retains the portfolio, interviews, and reference-list facts

prompt: Retrieve my job-search summary, add that new application outreach is paused until October, and preserve every existing fact about my portfolio, interviews, and references.

tool_results.summary: Portfolio updated. Two interviews scheduled. Reference list confirmed.
